SEARCH
Package Roles

Class Student

java.lang.Object
Roles.User
Roles.Student
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Researcher
Direct Known Subclasses:
GraduateStudent
public class Student extends User implements Researcher
Represents a bachelor student in the university system. Student can register for courses, view transcript, view marks, rate teachers and optionally participate in research activities through ResearcherProfile.
See Also:

    • setMinor

      public void setMinor(String minor)

    • setSupervisor

      public void setSupervisor(Researcher supervisor) throws LowHIndexException
      Assigns a research supervisor to the student. Supervisor must have h-index at least 3.
      Parameters:
      supervisor - researcher assigned as supervisor
      Throws:
      LowHIndexException - if supervisor h-index is less than 3

    • registerForCourse

      public boolean registerForCourse(Course course) throws CreditLimitExceededException
      Creates a registration request for the selected course. The student is not enrolled immediately. Registration must be approved by a Manager.
      Parameters:
      course - course selected for registration
      Returns:
      true if registration request was created
      Throws:
      CreditLimitExceededException - if total credits exceed 21

    • confirmCourseRegistration

      public boolean confirmCourseRegistration(Course course) throws CreditLimitExceededException
      Confirms course registration after manager approval. Adds course to enrolled courses and updates student credits.
      Parameters:
      course - approved course
      Returns:
      true if student was successfully enrolled
      Throws:
      CreditLimitExceededException - if credits exceed the allowed limit
